---
title: "Allen Choi"
image: selfie.jpg
about:
    template: broadside
    image-shape: rectangle
    links:
      - text: LinkedIn
        href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/allen-choi/
      - text: GitHub
        href: https://github.com/TheAllenChoi
      - text: Email
        href: mailto:achoi48@calpoly.edu
---

**Hello! Nice to meet you!**

My name is Allen Choi, and I am currently a second-year student here at California Polytechnic State University - San Luis Obispo. I like to spend my time reading, learning more about statistics, and drinking boba!

## Education

B.S. in Statistics, Minor in Data Science – California Polytechnic State University - San Luis Obispo \ 2021-2025

## Skills/Relevant Coursework

Google Data Analytics Certificate (In Progress) Calculus IV, Linear Algebra, Statistical Computing in R, Statistical Computing in SAS, Data Structures, Object Oriented Programming, Methods of Proofs.
